economic_ownership_map.label: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations

low.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
Q1 2026 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)
Normalized owner cash per diluted share (OCF proxy)
low.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow per share anchors mid-cycle network cash generation; capital spending exceeds GAAP free cash flow but OCF reflects ticket and loyalty economics.

low.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
low.rationale: Bear stresses fare wars and higher fuel; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest network recovery without peak-cycle heroics.

base.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
Q1 2026 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)
Normalized owner cash per diluted share (OCF proxy)
base.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow per share anchors mid-cycle network cash generation; capital spending exceeds GAAP free cash flow but OCF reflects ticket and loyalty economics.

base.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
base.rationale: Bear stresses fare wars and higher fuel; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest network recovery without peak-cycle heroics.

high.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
Q1 2026 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)
Normalized owner cash per diluted share (OCF proxy)
high.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow per share anchors mid-cycle network cash generation; capital spending exceeds GAAP free cash flow but OCF reflects ticket and loyalty economics.

high.label: Duration-adjusted owner-cash capitalization multiple
high.rationale: Bear stresses fare wars and higher fuel; base mid-cycle seven-year path; bull modest network recovery without peak-cycle heroics.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0000006201_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $54633.0M, OCF $3099.0M, cash $902.0M, total debt $29007.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics

low.label: Risk-adjusted incremental AAdvantage co-brand and partner economics
low.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on partner-funded loyalty economics not fully captured in normalized owner-cash multiple; base is judgment band pending standalone disclosure.

base.label: Risk-adjusted incremental AAdvantage co-brand and partner economics
base.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on partner-funded loyalty economics not fully captured in normalized owner-cash multiple; base is judgment band pending standalone disclosure.

high.label: Risk-adjusted incremental AAdvantage co-brand and partner economics
high.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on partner-funded loyalty economics not fully captured in normalized owner-cash multiple; base is judgment band pending standalone disclosure.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from AAL/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0000006201_26_000014.htm: FY2025 revenue $54633.0M, OCF $3099.0M, cash $902.0M, total debt $29007.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

probability_and_timing.timing_basis: Co-brand and partner mile contracts renew over 3 to 7 years; base case assumes continued monetization through FY2030.
probability_and_timing.probability_basis: Judgment from industry loyalty precedents; American does not disclose standalone AAdvantage segment economics in SEC filings.
probability_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: Partner-funded mile sales require no incremental owner capital in base case.

economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.

economic_ownership_map.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Net cash and debt claims on common equity

low.label: Long-term debt and finance lease obligations
Current debt and finance lease obligations
Net financial claim after cash and total debt
low.rationale: Filing-locked cash less total debt and capital lease obligations; low/high stress debt +5% / cash +15% with modest debt paydown.

base.label: Long-term debt and finance lease obligations
Current debt and finance lease obligations
Net financial claim after cash and total debt
base.rationale: Filing-locked cash less total debt and capital lease obligations; low/high stress debt +5% / cash +15% with modest debt paydown.

high.label: Long-term debt and finance lease obligations
Current debt and finance lease obligations
Net financial claim after cash and total debt
high.rationale: Filing-locked cash less total debt and capital lease obligations; low/high stress debt +5% / cash +15% with modest debt paydown.

method_route.label: Predictable cash-flow security
failure_modes: contract renewal or regulatory reset ignored
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Mid-cycle U.S. network passenger and cargo operations
AAdvantage co-brand and partner loyalty economics
Fuel, recession, and leverage stress reserve
Net cash and debt claims on common equity

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
